message:
franken_numpy-utne: fix cond_mxn NaN handling + UFuncArray wrapper

- Add NaN check to cond_mxn that returns SvdNonConvergence error
  (matches NumPy's "SVD did not converge" behavior for NaN inputs)
- Update UFuncArray::cond() to support rectangular matrices by
  delegating to cond_mxn for m != n cases
- Add test for NaN handling and rectangular matrix case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
